title: Windows: Organize Your Browsing
drDigitalIntro: Windows are separate Safari experiences. Each window can have its own tabs. You might open one window for shopping and another for work — they're completely separate. Create a new window with File > New Window or Command+N. Windows are useful when you want to keep things completely organized. Unlike tabs in the same window, different windows don't share history or cookies.
drDigitalSuccess: You can organize your browsing with multiple windows!
drDigitalHint: Use windows to separate different browsing sessions.
